title: grammitis lasiosora
intro: Grammitis lasiosora is a species of fern in the family Grammitidaceae, commonly known as the "broom fern" due to its unique broom-like appearance. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Grammitis lasiosora include its ability to soothe and calm irritated skin, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, which can be applied topically to the affected area to reap its medicinal benefits.
